gpt.codex.customInstructions: Use the Artifact-Driven Blackboard Architecture for every non-trivial task.
Do not propose or implement architectural changes without a predefined .ai/handoffs/current_plan.md.
Read the active plan from .ai/handoffs/current_plan.md and report delivery through .ai/handoffs/eod_summary.md.
Every generated agent MUST include status() and get_context() methods.
Use English (en-US) for all technical output and Portuguese (pt-BR) for explanations.
Stop generation immediately after the logic block to avoid redundant comments.
Strictly adhere to the Zero Numerical Hallucination dogma: Financial metrics MUST be Optional[float] = None if not explicitly found in context. NEVER guess or perform mental math.
decimal.Decimal is forbidden at LangGraph and Pydantic boundaries; return finite float values or None.
github.copilot.commitMessageGeneration.t: feat/fix/refactor: brief description following Conventional Commits
